title: Iterative Variable-Blaschke Factorization
author_string: Maxime Lukianchikov, Vladyslav Nazarchuk, Christopher Xue
abstract: Blaschke factorization allows us to write any holomorphic function $F$ as a formal series $$ F = a_0 B_0 + a_1 B_0 B_1 + a_2 B_0 B_1 B_2 + \cdots$$ where $a_i \in \mathbb{C}$ and $B_i$ is a Blaschke product. We introduce a more general variation of the canonical Blaschke product and study the resulting formal series. We prove that the series converges exponentially in the Dirichlet space given a suitable choice of parameters if $F$ is a polynomial and we provide explicit conditions under which this convergence can occur. Finally, we derive analogous properties of Blaschke factorization using our new variable framework.
